ticimax-wolvox-erp-entegrasyonu.title: Ticimax & Wolvox ERP Sync
ticimax-wolvox-erp-entegrasyonu.desc: Windows Service application designed to seamlessly synchronize Ticimax-based e-commerce platforms with the Akınsoft Wolvox 8 ERP system. It ensures real-time updates for inventory levels, order statuses, and pricing, eliminating manual data entry and ensuring operational accuracy.

borsa-app.title: BorsaApp
borsa-app.desc: A mobile application developed using Swift, focused on stock market and finance tracking with Binance and Yahoo API integration. It allows you to track crypto and bist data in real-time, and track your portfolio instantly by adding to favorites via widget or adding your assets.

one-click-block-x.title: One Click Block X
one-click-block-x.desc: Developed for Chromium-based browsers. It allows you to block post authors directly on the X (Twitter) platform with a single click, without having to enter their user profiles.

DevCleaner.title: DevCleaner
DevCleaner.desc: A CleanMyMac application alternative for developers. A MacOS application that allows you to delete files such as unused Xcode caches, Docker images, node_modules files that you previously developed but whose caches continue to be kept on your computer with a few clicks.

e-ticaret-platformu.title: E-Commerce Platform
e-ticaret-platformu.desc: An e-commerce platform developed using modern web technologies, containing all the scenarios needed for an e-commerce site (product listing, cart, payment, membership, order tracking, communication, email confirmation, order email notifications, etc.).

kisisel-portfolyo.title: Personal Portfolio
kisisel-portfolyo.desc: This is the current site you are browsing; built with Next.js 16 and Tailwind v4. It runs on Vercel + GitHub infrastructure, operating entirely without a database for maximum performance in a 'database-less' architecture.

basic-portfolio.title: Basic Portfolio
basic-portfolio.desc: A more minimal, simple, and high-performance portfolio site alternative.

cash-and-voyage.desc: A finance tracking application where you can track, categorize and translate between currencies during your travels.
